bullet_changes.original_text: Analyzed single-cell RNA sequencing data (10x Genomics) using Seurat in R; identified 3 candidate marker genes for a macrophage subpopulation
bullet_changes.revised_text: Analyzed single-cell RNA sequencing data using Seurat in R and Bioinformatics techniques, identifying 3 candidate marker genes for a macrophage subpopulation.

bullet_changes.original_text: Developed a Python pipeline (pandas, SciPy) to process and normalize 96-well plate fluorescence data from 40+ assays; reduced analyst processing time by 70%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed a Python pipeline utilizing pandas and SciPy to process and normalize 96-well plate fluorescence data from 40+ assays, reducing analyst processing time by 70% through optimized Bioinformatics workflows.

bullet_changes.original_text: Designed and executed in vitro experiments characterizing cytokine signaling responses in primary human macrophages under TGF-β stimulation
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and executed in vitro experiments characterizing cytokine signaling responses in primary human macrophages under TGF-β stimulation, applying principles of Biology and Bioinformatics to inform experimental design.

bullet_changes.original_text: Performed CRISPR-Cas9 knockout screens in Jurkat T-cell lines to identify resistance mechanisms to PD-1 checkpoint inhibitors
bullet_changes.revised_text: Performed CRISPR-Cas9 knockout screens in Jurkat T-cell lines to identify resistance mechanisms to PD-1 checkpoint inhibitors, leveraging Bioinformatics and Biology expertise to analyze genomic data.

bullet_changes.original_text: Maintained cell culture protocols for 6 cell lines; trained 2 new summer interns on aseptic technique
bullet_changes.revised_text: Maintained cell culture protocols for 6 cell lines, applying Biology principles to ensure aseptic technique and trained 2 new summer interns on best practices, supporting the research team's Bioinformatics and Biology endeavors.

bullet_changes.original_text: Processed and analyzed NGS library data using custom Python scripts; delivered ranked hit list to senior scientist within agreed timeline
bullet_changes.revised_text: Processed and analyzed NGS library data using custom Python scripts and Bioinformatics techniques, delivering a ranked hit list to senior scientist within agreed timeline and demonstrating proficiency in Biology and data analysis.

bullet_changes.original_text: Characterized sensor linearity, sensitivity, and response time; achieved R² = 0.996 over 0–20 mM range
bullet_changes.revised_text: Characterized sensor linearity, sensitivity, and response time, achieving a high correlation coefficient (R² = 0.996) over a 0-20 mM lactate range

bullet_changes.original_text: Fabricated sensor substrates using photolithography in MIT.nano cleanroom
bullet_changes.revised_text: Fabricated sensor substrates using photolithography in the MIT.nano cleanroom

bullet_changes.original_text: Containerized pipeline using Docker for reproducibility; documented on GitHub
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed a containerized pipeline using Docker for enhanced reproducibility and deployed it on GitHub for version control
